products.name: VH-3 185 kW
products.descriptor: 185 kW piston-based hybrid-electric powerplant for commercial and military aviation

evidence.snippet: Development of the VH-3 is supported by multiple U.S. Air Force and NASA programs involving  multiple airframe applications across different markets. A trusted partner of the Air Force, VerdeGo was awarded a program to develop and test the first production-intent VH-3 prototype, accelerating its path toward operational deployment.

products.name: VH-4T 400 kW
products.descriptor: 400 kW turbine hybrid-electric powerplant family built around Pratt & Whitney PW206/PW207

evidence.snippet: *   Built around a certified helicopter engine, the Pratt & Whitney PW206/PW207
Inquire for ordering and delivery schedule.

products.name: VH-4T-RD
products.descriptor: 375 kW series-only turbine hybrid powerplant variant for R&D and unmanned flight testing

evidence.snippet:
### VH-4T-RD
*   Max Cont Power Output: 375 kW
*   SFC: 0.63 lb/HPhr (383 g/kWhr)
*   Weight: 511 lbs (232 kg)
*   Configuration: Series only
*   Redundancy: not single fault tolerant
*   Applications: suitable for R&D ground testing and unmanned flight testing
Inquire for ordering and delivery schedule.

products.name: VH-4T-415
products.descriptor: 415 kW series/parallel fault-tolerant turbine hybrid powerplant for production applications

evidence.snippet:
### VH-4T-415
*   Max Cont Power Output: 415 kW
*   SFC: 0.61 lb/HPhr (371 g/kWhr)
*   Weight: 565 lbs (257 kg)
*   Configuration: Series or Parallel
*   Redundancy: single fault tolerant
*   Applications: suitable for production applications
Inquire for ordering and delivery schedule.

products.name: VH-5 Blended Turbofan
products.descriptor: Electrically convertible turbofan switching between jet thrust and up to 1.5 MW electrical output for HSVTOL aircraft

evidence.snippet:
### VH-5 Blended Turbofan
VH-5 Blended Turbofan
=====================
### Electrically convertible turbofan

VerdeGo Aero is currently working with leading airframers in the military and civilian markets to refine the VH-5 and its power-blending technologies, and define the sizing for the initial product that will bring these revolutionary capabilities to market. Airframers interested in participating in the VH-5 industry group should contact VerdeGo Aero.

products.name: Aircraft Integration
products.descriptor: Engineering services for integrating VerdeGo hybrid-electric powerplants into customer aircraft

evidence.snippet:
### Aircraft Integration
SEAMLESS INTEGRATION FOR MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE
============================================
VerdeGo Aero brings unparalleled expertise in hybrid-electric powerplant integration, with a proven track record in commercial and military applications. As pioneers of hybrid-electric flight we invite you to harness our 15 years of industry-leading experience in this area to power innovation in your aircraft.

unresolved_questions: VH-5 Blended Turbofan readiness: page indicates VerdeGo is still refining the design and defining sizing with airframers — classified as prototype, but a definitive maturity designation is not stated on the page.

VH-3 185 kW readiness: page references 'first production-intent VH-3 prototype' — classified as prototype; product may advance to production_intent or low_rate_production as U.S. Air Force program matures.
